response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with over 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development at re:cinq — a rare and directly relevant match for the AI agent development requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, TDD, and strong testing culture are well evidenced. Gaps are moderate: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and Kotlin/Python are absent (Java appears only briefly), but the breadth and craftsmanship focus suggest these are learnable quickly.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB product work
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin and Python missing; Java exposure is dated and limited
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the target stack

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency in core TS/Node/React stack
